root.sql: select vr_bon_lon.* , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( membership_no ) as member_name , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( membership_no ) as member_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name_mem( membership_no ) as member_group_name from vr_bon_lon where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ order by loan_type , membership_no
